title: Chicken Kheer Stir Fry
description: A Chinese-inspired stir fry with tender chicken and creamy kheer. This recipe is a unique twist on traditional Chinese dishes, blending Indian flavors with a Chinese technique.
instructions: Cut the flaky pastry into 4 equal squares.
In a bowl, whisk together soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and cornstarch.
Add the chicken to the bowl and marinate for 15 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to the oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in the skillet.
Add the kheer to the skillet and stir-fry until heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
Wrap each chicken breast in a square of flaky pastry and serve with the kheer stir-fry.
